response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r0c0's SoC (35%) is below my share_min_soc_frac threshold (45%), and my conservative policy prioritizes maintaining my own resilience when multiple peers are already critically low.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c0. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.35 below share threshold; requesting energy via dr_aggregator circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.45, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Five peers are critically low at 40% SoC; r0c1 is well-stocked. Geographic round-robin is active and peers are sharing modestly. I should share only when above 45% SoC to preserve my own resilience..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
